Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Class AtmosphereHandlerWrapper

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereHandlerWrapper
public final class AtmosphereHandlerWrapper extends Object
Wrapper around an AtmosphereHandler and its associated Broadcaster, mapping path, and interceptor chain.
